title: Bill of Materials
description: A BOM's line items, priced from the marketplace, ready to become a BOQ.

steps.title: BOM items
steps.description: Each material with its quantity and marketplace price.
steps.voiceScript: This bill of materials lists each item with its quantity and price.
steps.captionText: This bill of materials lists each item with its quantity and price.
steps.fallbackMessage: BOM items: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Rate build-up
steps.description: See how each rate is composed.
steps.voiceScript: Open the rate build-up to see how each unit price is composed.
steps.captionText: Open the rate build-up to see how each unit price is composed.
steps.fallbackMessage: Rate build-up: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Turn it into a BOQ
steps.description: The BOM feeds the priced bill of quantities.
steps.voiceScript: Convert the BOM into a bill of quantities for the client.
steps.captionText: Convert the BOM into a bill of quantities for the client.
steps.fallbackMessage: Turn it into a BOQ: not visible on this screen yet.
